name: Apple Pecan Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spread pecans in a shallow baking pan and bake until golden, about 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. In a greased 3-quart or larger slow cooker, place bread cubes.
4. Peel, core, and thinly slice the apples.
5. Mix together sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg, then add eggs and mix well.
6. Blend in half-and-half or milk, then stir in bourbon or brandy.
7. Lightly mix pecans with bread and apples.
8. Pour egg mixture over bread.
9. Drizzle with butter.
10. Cover and cook on low until apples are tender when pierced and custard is set; about 3½ to 4½ hours.
11. Let pudding stand, covered, for about 15 minutes before serving warm with vanilla ice cream, if desired.
